# GitHub repository “About” (manual setup)

GitHub does **not** read this file automatically. Open **repo → ⚙ Settings → General**, then fill **Description**, **Website**, and **Topics** (or use the gear icon on the repo home **About** box).

## Suggested (English)

One-line style (similar rhythm to: *“Open-source X for Y, Z, and W.”*):

> **Open-source small programming language and `sym` CLI—static types, ADTs, multi-file `import`, tree interpreter, and optional bytecode VM—for scripts, tooling pipelines, and LLM-friendly code.**

Shorter variant:

> **Open-source interpreted language with the `sym` CLI: static types, ADTs, imports, tree interpreter, and stack bytecode VM for scripts and tool-friendly automation.**

| Field | Paste this |
|-------|------------|
| **Description** | Open-source small programming language and `sym` CLI—static types, ADTs, multi-file `import`, tree interpreter, and optional bytecode VM—for scripts, tooling pipelines, and LLM-friendly code. |
| **Website** | `https://andoop.github.io/sym/` (GitHub Pages from `/docs`; enable in Settings → Pages) |
| **Topics** | `sym`, `programming-language`, `interpreter`, `compiler`, `rust`, `bytecode`, `typechecker`, `cli` |

## 建议（中文维护者）

| 项 | 可填写内容 |
|----|------------|
| **描述** | 开源小型编程语言与 `sym` 命令行：静态类型、ADT、多文件 `import`、树遍历解释器与可选字节码 VM，面向脚本、工具链与利于 LLM/工具协同的代码。（英文 one-liner 见上表 Description。） |
| **网站** | `https://andoop.github.io/sym/`（需在仓库 Settings → Pages 启用 **main** + **/docs**） |
| **主题标签** | 同上英文 topics（GitHub 标签一般为英文） |

## Quick steps

1. Open <https://github.com/andoop/sym/settings> (need admin).
2. Under **General**, set **Description** and **Website**.
3. On the repo main page, click **⚙** next to **About** → add **Topics** from the list above.
